page: Amazon Web Services c9gd.12xlarge is a compute-optimized server instance powered by custom AWS Graviton ARM64 processors. It features 48 dedicated physical cores operating at a clock speed of 2.8 GHz, with a 1:1 mapping of vCPUs to physical cores. This architecture eliminates simultaneous multithreading overhead, providing consistent performance for compute-bound workloads. The instance is equipped with 96.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

For local storage requirements, the c9gd.12xlarge includes 2850 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD instance storage. This bundled storage capacity is suitable for applications requiring low-latency scratch space or high-speed caching. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps, managed via the AWS Nitro hypervisor to ensure minimal virtualization overhead and secure resource isolation.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ARM64 architecture and dedicated core allocation offer a favorable performance-per-watt and resource density profile compared to traditional x86 architectures. The combination of high-density compute resources and integrated NVMe storage makes this instance well-suited for distributed data processing, high-performance web serving, media encoding, and containerized microservices that benefit from localized high-speed storage.
description: Amazon Web Services c9gd.12xlarge is a compute-optimized, ARM64-based server instance powered by custom AWS Graviton processors. It features 48 dedicated physical cores running at 2.8 GHz with no hyper-threading, paired with 96.0 GB of system memory. This configuration establishes a 2.0 GB per core memory ratio, optimized for compute-intensive tasks. The instance includes 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, providing high-speed, low-latency local data access. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps, managed through the AWS Nitro hypervisor. This hardware profile delivers a cost-efficient balance of dedicated ARM compute power and high-speed local storage, making it suitable for distributed data processing, containerized microservices, and high-performance web serving workloads.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c9gd.12xlarge is an ARM64 compute-optimized instance featuring 48 dedicated Graviton cores, 96 GB RAM, 2850 GB local NVMe SSD storage, and 25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

tagline: An ARM64 compute-optimized platform featuring dedicated physical cores and high-capacity local NVMe SSD storage for intensive data processing.

96.0 GB of system memory providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio
2850 GB of integrated local NVMe SSD storage for low-latency data access

Optimized for distributed data processing, containerized microservices, and web serving
